vzw-network-operations-api.description: Provides network policy controls for incident-critical mobile endpoints operating on Verizon infrastructure. The API supports OAuth2 token issuance scoped to a specific incident, near-real-time location resolution, Quality on Demand reservation management, radio coverage visibility, and policy class discovery for field-deployed response devices. Integrators use this API to prioritize emergency communications, monitor service posture, and enforce approved policy profiles during active incidents.
endpointSummaries: Adjust active Quality on Demand profile
Get incident RAN coverage heat tiles
List allowed policy classes for field devices

vzw-location-routing-api.description: Provides dispatch-grade geospatial capabilities for Verizon field operations, including address normalization, forward and reverse geocoding, traffic-aware route computation, rerouting around live hazards, corridor closure visibility, and cellular dead-zone overlays. Responses include operational confidence metadata to support automated routing decisions in urban and suburban service areas.
endpointSummaries: Recompute route around hazards and closures
List active traffic incidents and closures

vzw-city-dispatch-api.description: Provides incident lifecycle management, multi-unit assignment, dispatch command orchestration, escalation workflows, and telemetry subscription controls for Verizon city operations. This API is designed for command center operators, regional dispatch supervisors, and downstream responder systems coordinating emergency response activity in the San Francisco metropolitan area.

vzw-telemetry-ingest-api.description:
The VZW Telemetry Ingest API provides ingestion and operational visibility endpoints for responder field telemetry.

The API supports high-volume telemetry event intake, diagnostic trace ingestion, alert rule management,
active and historical alert retrieval, operator acknowledgements, and incident-level telemetry summaries
used by command and dispatch dashboards.

vzw-edge-monitor-api.description: The VZW Edge Monitor API provides observability controls for Verizon MEC edge node operations. The API exposes inventory, point-in-time health views, synthetic probe execution, metric histogram retrieval, regional capacity snapshots, and incident registration workflows used by NOC and platform engineering teams.

vzw-campus-device-registry-api.description: Provides enterprise-grade endpoint onboarding, SIM and eSIM binding, and capability inventory management for private 5G campus networks. This API manages device identity, ownership, lifecycle controls, trust posture, and policy-based connectivity activation so network operators can safely onboard and operate heterogeneous campus endpoints at scale.
endpointSummaries: Get device profile and trust posture
Bind SIM or eSIM and activate policy package

vzw-spectrum-allocation-api.description:
The VZW Spectrum Allocation API provides local CBRS and private-band spectrum planning capabilities for enterprise campus deployments.
It helps RF engineering and network operations teams request grants, validate interference constraints, and manage channel/eirp updates
while enforcing policy guardrails for zone-level compliance.

Key capabilities include:
- Grant request workflows for CBRS PAL/GAA and private LTE/NR channels.
- Interference simulation against adjacent sectors and floor-level zones.
- Heatmap retrieval for RF utilization, occupancy, and guardband pressure.
- Controlled patch operations for modifying active grants with validation windows.

The API is intended for orchestration systems, NOC automation, and campus planning dashboards.
endpointSummaries: Get grant status and expiration windows

vzw-slice-orchestrator-api.description: Creates and lifecycle-manages enterprise network slices for private 5G campus deployments. The API provisions 3GPP-aligned slice characteristics (SST and SD), applies radio and core policy packs, controls device or site membership, and enforces QoS policy through 5QI, GBR, and AMBR parameters. It is designed for tenant-isolated workloads that require deterministic performance and auditable operational controls.
endpointSummaries: List slices for a campus or tenant
Get slice topology and policy details
Update slice SLO and admission controls
Add a device or site membership to a slice

vzw-ran-optimization-api.description:
The VZW RAN Optimization API orchestrates continuous radio access network (RAN) tuning
for private campus networks. It combines KPI telemetry, policy-aware parameter
recommendations, and controlled rollout plans to improve throughput, handover stability,
and latency SLO adherence.

The API is designed for closed-loop optimization workflows where network engineers:
  - start scoped optimization jobs for selected campuses and slices,
  - review candidate parameter deltas and confidence scores,
  - request deterministic parameter recommendations for specific cells,
  - apply approved plans with operational guardrails,
  - monitor anomaly signals after rollout.
endpointSummaries: Start optimization run scoped by campus and slice
Get job progress and candidate parameter deltas
Get PRB utilization, HO failure rate, and RSRP/RSRQ statistics
Recommend PCI, tilt, and power adjustments

vzw-edge-policy-enforcement-api.description: Enforces zero-trust edge access, traffic steering, and policy controls across Verizon private network slices. This API manages policy lifecycle, distribution to enforcement points, and auditable decision telemetry required for regulated enterprise operations.

vzw-campus-service-assurance-api.description: Provides service assurance capabilities for Verizon campus workloads, including service-level objective (SLO) lifecycle management, burn-rate monitoring, incident creation, root-cause correlation across telemetry domains, and campus-wide service health scorecards. This API is intended for SRE and NOC automation where rapid detection, triage, and mitigation of service degradation are required.
endpointSummaries: List SLO definitions by slice or application tier
Create SLO with thresholds and burn-rate windows
Get current burn metrics and forecast breach time
Open service incident from SLO breach
List incidents with pagination and status or severity filters
Correlate incident with RAN, policy, and slice change events

vzw-grid-asset-registry-api.description: Maintains the authoritative registry for physical and logical utility grid assets used by Verizon Grid Intelligence workloads. The API supports asset onboarding, lifecycle updates, tag annotation, and topology traversal across substations, feeders, relays, and smart meters. Registry records include operational state, utility region, criticality tier, and geospatial metadata required for planning, outage triage, and orchestration use cases.
endpointSummaries: Get a utility asset by id
Update mutable fields on a utility asset
Retrieve upstream and downstream topology for an asset
Add tags to a utility asset

vzw-meter-connectivity-api.description: Monitor and control smart meter connectivity across LTE, NB-IoT, and 5G access networks for utility grid operations. The API provides connectivity session lifecycle management, near real-time meter health telemetry, remote network profile updates, and anomaly reporting for operations centers and automation systems.

vzw-outage-correlation-api.description: Correlates meter, substation, feeder, and network telemetry alarms into outage hypotheses for utility operations. Supports evidence ingestion, hypothesis recomputation, impact analysis, and outage closure workflows used by network operations centers and automated dispatch systems.
endpointSummaries: Create outage hypothesis from alarm correlation
Get impacted zones and feeder impact analysis

vzw-crew-mobilization-api.description: Dispatches and tracks field crews for outage restoration workflows across wireline, wireless, and edge infrastructure incidents. Supports work-order intake, crew assignment, in-progress status transitions, safety checklist completion, and real-time crew availability lookups. Designed for network operations centers, regional dispatch coordinators, and automated orchestration systems managing restoration at scale.
endpointSummaries: Create a crew mobilization work order
Assign a crew to a work order
Complete safety checklist for a work order

vzw-demand-response-api.description:
The VZW Demand Response API enables utility and grid-operations partners to initiate,
coordinate, and monitor demand-response and load-shed events across enrolled customer
and infrastructure segments.

The API provides lifecycle controls for event creation, participant signal dispatch,
measured-performance reporting, and controlled event termination during grid stress,
generation shortfalls, or distribution contingency windows.

vzw-regulatory-reporting-api.description: Generates auditable outage reliability and demand-response filings for utility regulators. This API supports report creation, regulator submission workflows, report retrieval, and filing audit evidence required for compliance programs and external investigations.

vzw-identity-federation-api.description: Provides enterprise identity federation capabilities for Verizon partner integrations. The API exchanges external identity provider assertions for Verizon-issued OAuth tokens, manages trusted API clients, and exposes signing key metadata used by relying parties to validate token signatures. It is designed for service-to-service trust mediation, delegated API access, and controlled lifecycle management of federated client credentials.
endpointSummaries: Exchange enterprise SSO assertion for Verizon access token
Get JWKS document for token signature verification

vzw-webhook-delivery-api.description: Provides reliable outbound webhook fanout for internal Verizon domain events. The service manages subscriber endpoints, signs payloads with HMAC, applies exponential retry policies, and routes terminal failures to a dead-letter queue for operational replay and investigation.

vzw-billing-rating-api.description: Usage rating and charge calculation API for Verizon API and network service consumption. This service prices metered usage in near-real time by using effective tariffs, commitment allowances, and overage policy. Integrators can request pre-billing quotes, submit usage records for rating, inspect immutable rating decisions, manage tariff catalog lifecycle, and recalculate invoice rollups when tariff or entitlement changes occur.

vzw-notification-orchestration-api.description: Orchestrates customer and operator notifications across SMS, email, and push channels with runtime preference enforcement. Supports message template lifecycle management, notification dispatch tracking, and per-party communication preference controls including quiet hours, channel policy, locale, and opt-in status.

vzw-api-consumer-analytics-api.description: Provides usage analytics, error intelligence, anomaly detection, and quota exhaustion forecasts for Verizon partner API consumers. The API is designed for partner operations teams that need measurable adoption trends, service quality indicators, and proactive capacity planning insights across products, apps, and consumer organizations.
endpointSummaries: Get usage analytics for a consumer
Get error analytics for a consumer
Get adoption metrics for a product

vzw-incident-intake-gateway-api.description: Provides a normalized, secure intake gateway for multi-channel incident reports before downstream dispatch routing. The service accepts emergency and operational reports from public safety channels, customer applications, IoT telemetry, and assisted voice workflows, then performs schema validation, geospatial verification, deduplication, and context enrichment. This API is the canonical intake boundary for Verizon incident processing in the intake domain.
endpointSummaries: Ingest incident from any configured intake channel
Validate incident payload schema and geospatial consistency
List pending incidents waiting for triage
Enrich incident with geospatial, caller, and history context
Merge duplicate incident reports into canonical incident

vzw-geospatial-hazard-intel-api.description: Provides hazard zone enrichment, risk scoring, and geo-fence alerting capabilities for dispatch and routing decisions across Verizon field operations. The API supports retrieval of active hazard polygons, point-in-zone risk computation, geofence lifecycle management, and advisory publication to impacted units.
endpointSummaries: Compute hazard risk score for point

vzw-fleet-state-cache-api.description: Provides a low-latency unit state cache used by dispatch applications to retrieve responder availability, current assignment lifecycle status, and latest known position snapshots. The API is optimized for read-heavy readiness workflows and near-real-time location lookups.

vzw-dispatch-workflow-engine-api.description: Stateful dispatch workflow orchestration API for coordinating incident response across network operations, field service teams, and partner agencies. The API supports workflow creation from incidents, step-level execution tracking, SLA breach forecasting, escalation management, and controlled inter-agency handoff.
endpointSummaries: Get SLA status and breach forecast

vzw-campus-identity-proxy-api.description: Edge identity broker for campus service trust, token mediation, and device certificate validation. This API exchanges external identity provider tokens for campus-scoped bearer tokens, validates security artifacts for downstream campus services, manages trust anchors, and brokers authenticated sessions for zero-trust campus workloads.
endpointSummaries: Exchange external token for campus bearer token
Validate token and return normalized claims
List trusted CAs and identity providers

vzw-radio-observability-stream-api.description:
Radio KPI event stream aggregation API used by RAN observability and optimization workflows.
The service ingests high-volume radio telemetry (RSRP, RSRQ, SINR, CQI), computes
windowed aggregates per stream and network dimensions (cell, sector, slice), flags
statistical anomalies, and manages real-time subscription delivery for KPI alerts.

Primary use cases:
- Ingest near-real-time KPI events from gNodeB and edge collectors
- Query stream-level and cell-level health and performance trends
- Detect KPI deviations with z-score-driven anomaly logic
- Subscribe downstream optimization engines to alert events
endpointSummaries: Get historical KPI timeline for a cell

vzw-qos-admission-control-api.description:
API for QoS admission checks, capacity gating, and SLA-aware reservation in
5G slice-aware environments.

The service evaluates incoming QoS intents against current slice utilization,
policy thresholds, and SLA requirements, then returns deterministic admission
outcomes with machine-actionable reasons.
endpointSummaries: Evaluate QoS request against current capacity and policy
Reserve QoS resources for an admitted session
Get current capacity and utilization for a slice
List admission policies by slice type and priority
Update admission policy thresholds and actions

vzw-campus-digital-twin-api.description: Provides digital twin projection and analysis capabilities for Verizon campus environments. The API supports deterministic twin snapshot creation from live state, spatial topology retrieval, what-if simulation execution, drift detection between projected and observed state, and lifecycle management for twin assets used by NOC, capacity planning, and campus engineering automation.
endpointSummaries: Create a digital twin snapshot from live campus state
List digital twins with pagination and filters
Get twin topology with device, slice, and cell positions
Run what-if simulation on an existing twin
Get simulation results with predicted KPIs

vzw-grid-topology-sync-api.description: Synchronizes utility distribution grid topology from upstream GIS and SCADA source systems into the operational asset graph used by dispatch, outage analysis, switching plans, and telemetry routing. The API supports asynchronous sync jobs, topology retrieval, consistency validation, and change log inspection.
endpointSummaries: Get sync job status and change summary
List feeder segments and connectivity graph metadata
Get downstream assets from a feeder point
List configured upstream GIS and SCADA sources

vzw-substation-edge-gateway-api.description:
API for secure telemetry relay and control-plane interactions between field
RTUs/IEDs and Verizon cloud applications through hardened substation edge gateways.

The service supports SCADA protocol normalization, telemetry batch ingest,
latest reading retrieval, command relay, and runtime gateway configuration updates.
endpointSummaries: Get latest telemetry per connected device
Update gateway relay and filter configuration

vzw-load-forecasting-api.description: Provides load and demand forecasting capabilities for grid operations, DER integration, and medium-term to long-term capacity planning workflows. The API supports forecast generation for region, feeder, and substation scopes, model registration and governance, weather feed observability, and what-if scenario simulation for planning decisions.

vzw-restoration-priority-engine-api.description: Computes and manages outage restoration priorities across network incidents using impact severity, critical infrastructure dependencies, operational risk, and regulatory weighting. The API supports bulk score computation, queue retrieval, score breakdown inspection, manual overrides with audit justification, and scoring rule transparency.
endpointSummaries: Compute restoration priorities for outage set
Get priority score and contributing factors for outage
Apply or update manual priority override
List critical facilities that boost outage priority
Get active priority scoring rules and weights
